name: motoelite-motorbike-showroom
description: Premium Motorbike Showroom — Full-stack web application with Node.js backend, MongoDB database, and vanilla HTML/CSS/JS frontend featuring Three.js 3D hero section and admin dashboard.
author: MotoElite Dev Team

scripts.setup: npm run install:backend && echo "✅ Setup complete! Copy backend/.env.example to backend/.env and run npm run seed"
